text:
KINGSTON, Jamaica — A Mac-11 sub-machine gun containing twelve 9mm rounds of ammunition, was seized from an abandoned vehicle after it crashed into a wall on Tangerine Road in Olympic Gardens on Tuesday.

According to police reports, a team of officers from the St Andrew South Police Division observed a Toyota Axio motor car speeding along the roadway. It is reported that the vehicle crashed into a wall and the occupants fled. The lawmen then searched the car and found the weapon and ammunition inside.

No one was arrested in relation to the seizure.

The investigation continues.

HOUSE RULES
